pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 2.7.x to 3.2.x, which requires Jakarta EE namespaces and is incompatible with Java 17 in this context.
Upgrade Spring Cloud to 2023.0.1 to match the Spring Boot 3.x release train.
Replace javax.annotation dependencies with jakarta.annotation to comply with Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
Replace javax.validation dependencies with jakarta.validation to comply with Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
Update Jakarta JSON API dependency to use the correct Jakarta namespace and version.
Replace javax.activation with jakarta.activation-api to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
Switch MyBatis-Plus starter to the Spring Boot 3 compatible artifact.
Upgrade gRPC Spring Boot starter to version 3.x which supports Spring Boot 3.
Upgrade Hibernate Validator to 8.0.1 to support Jakarta Validation API.
